case_title: FELEKE MIRGA VS. SAN FRANCISCO SUPER CAB

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM WONG, SF SUPER CAB CFO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRGA, FELEKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SUPER CAB STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
